payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Dark-stained wooden dresser with a matte finish, multiple drawers with dark metal cup/pull handles and modest carved drawer fronts; left side is partially occluded by a bed in the foreground and the top surface holds small objects, appearing close to the camera (approx. 1.0 m) and mostly visible on the right side of the crop.
attributes: visible top surface with small objects

message.content: {"label":"dresser","short_description":"dark wooden dresser, right crop","long_description":"Dark-stained wooden dresser with a matte finish, multiple drawers with dark metal cup/pull handles and modest carved drawer fronts; left side is partially occluded by a bed in the foreground and the top surface holds small objects, appearing close to the camera (approx. 1.0 m) and mostly visible on the right side of the crop.","attributes":["dark stained wood","multiple drawers (at least five)","dark metal cup/pull handles","traditional/carved drawer fronts","matte finish","visible top surface with small objects","partial left-side occlusion by bed","right-side mostly visible"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
